title: Word 3 - BLOCK TALK (TEN WORDS translation)
author: joshualinog
excerpt: # Word 3 - BLOCK TALK (TEN WORDS translation) ## 5.9b ## 'I got a reason for word 2.  The reason for word 2 is because of something about _me_. But it's also something about you. Your special image co
body:
# Word 3 - BLOCK TALK (TEN WORDS translation)
## 5.9b
## 'I got a reason for word 2.  The reason for word 2 is because of something about _me_. But it's also something about you. Your special image comes from the special father and mother pair I am making in a big special marriage. My image is male and the female paired: in this special marriage image, the female is my nation, my people.  But who is the male in this big special marriage image? I already tell you I only  your God.  I also already tell you my name is Yahweh, but I have _another_ name. This name is the male in the big special marriage image. Here's my other name for you, my special marriage name: El-Qana, GOD-the down-here-on-the-ground-in-your-face-always-pushing-never-stopping-super-only-head-husband Word Bodyguard . Here is the reason my name is Head-Husband-Word -Bodyguard: 

' 
## 5.10
## I, Yahweh, the Head-Husband Word-Bodyguard, ALWAYS guard my special marriage image. Only the two can be one. I never stopping always keeping the two to be one, keeping my special marriage image and guarding it. I am the head, and I guard my body, my wife.

### some more ideas 

## I, Yahweh, the head husband word bodyguard guard my special marriage image. Only the two can be one. I never stopping always keeping the two to be one, keeping my special marriage image and guarding it.

## I am guarding the two becoming one. I am guarding my special marriage image. I'm guarding my wife, my people. When the two of us become one and make a new image, children, I guarding this image too. 

## El-Qana, GOD-the down-here-on-the-ground-in-your-face-always-pushing-never-stopping-super-only-head-husband Word Bodyguard . Here is the reason my name is Head-Husband-Word -Bodyguard

## I'm always showing up, in the tiny things and the big. I visiting the tiny one person in my people face to face, and I also visiting the big groups in my people, down on the ground. I never stopping this, I always pushing hard. I am the super only. 

## I show up to every single part of my wife, my people. I visit every single one. I come down to every single person, and push to guard my special marriage image, and all the images that keep coming out, even the smallest seed.

## I, the head husband word bodyguard, I am always visiting, never stopping, on the ground, face to face. When one person, even just one little person with one little life, loves on me, I love back big. If this one little person loves me with their little life, and keeps my commandments, and loves to love me, I will love back too big for their one little life. I will love 1000 of this person's Sons and sons of sons. I will love them with a never stopping, always pushing, super only Faithful Love that is too big to fit in their one little life, and that Love Will keep going after  thousands of their children and chasing a thousand of their children's children.


## I, the head husband word bodyguard, I am always visiting, never stopping, on the ground, face to face. When one person, even just one little person, with their one single life, hates me, I guard my special marriage image big, too big for their one little lifetime. I will make sure that, no sneaking works. No hiding from the word bodyguard, no getting away. They will not be able to make their own fake marriage image in my special wife. I will not let them build their own version of my special marriage image. They will not last, and they will not be able to keep making their fake image. I will make sure when they try to twist and break my special marriage image on purpose, that the action they did doesn't go away from them. I will make sure that the bad action they did, stays with them and on them. It will come after them and catch up to them. It will follow them for their whole tiny lifetime, four generations. When they break my special image, I will make sure that this breaking they did, sticks to them, to their sons, and to their grandsons. No matter how hard they try to separate their yucky action from themselves, and pretend so they can keep it hidden. I will always push, and I will not be lazy and just do nothing. I will not miss anything, and nothing will be hidden. I will show up against this person who hates me face to face. They will not go scot-free, that's not how I, the head husband word bodyguard moves.





## when I'm guarding that image I'm doing two things...

**Reference for Hebrew** #187
